symptoms: Users receiving 3–5 identical push notifications per order event
Push notification provider billing anomaly: 4× expected volume
App store reviews mentioning notification spam
hypotheses_tested: Kafka consumer group rebalance during deploy caused messages to be re-processed
confirmed_root_cause: Kafka consumer group rebalance during deploy caused messages to be re-processed without idempotency check. Each partition reassignment replayed last 1000 messages.
resolution_action: Added deduplication check on event_id before sending push notification. Kafka consumer configured with explicit partition assignment during deploys.
